content: TanStack Query v5 with Next.js 15 App Router: Create src/providers/query-provider.tsx with 'use client' directive wrapping QueryClientProvider. Create a stable QueryClient singleton (not in useState, not via getQueryClient — just module-level 'const queryClient = new QueryClient()'). Wrap children in layout.tsx via the providers component. Set staleTime > 0 (e.g., 60*1000) to prevent immediate refetch on hydration. For advanced SSR: HydrationBoundary + dehydrate can pass server-side prefetches to client. In Phase 3, Phase 3 uses TanStack Query only for client-side caching of resolved places and optimize results — no SSR prefetch needed.
